appliedUpdates.description: No new knowledge; existing Docker rebuild note covers the fix flow. nginx stale DNS after docker compose up -d requires restarting the nginx container separately (docker compose restart nginx).

frictions.description: After docker compose build && up -d, nginx had stale DNS entries for ypm-ethereum and ypm-base (IPs swapped after container recreation). Required an explicit 'docker compose restart nginx' to resolve.
frictions.resolution: Restarted nginx container after rebuilding chain containers.
